how_to_apply: Apply morning and evening to clean, dry skin. Use gentle circular motions until fully absorbed.
active_ingredients: Niacinamide, Ceramides, Prebiotic Thermal Spring Water
contraindications: None known. Fragrance-free and suitable for very sensitive skin.

how_to_apply: Sweep one pad across clean skin after cleansing. Use the textured side first to exfoliate, then the smooth side to soothe. Follow with moisturiser. Use SPF the next morning.
active_ingredients: Salicylic Acid, Lactic Acid, AHA Fruit Complex
contraindications: Avoid around the eye area. Use SPF as it contains exfoliating acids. Not suitable during pregnancy.

how_to_apply: Apply a small amount around the eye area morning and evening using ring fingers. Tap gently until absorbed.
active_ingredients: Retinal 2% Liposome, Ginseng Root Extract 10%, Niacinamide, Glycerin
contraindications: Avoid during pregnancy and breastfeeding due to retinal content.

claude_description: A repairing serum for inflammatory and acne-prone skin. Contains Niacinamide and Ol-Oligopeptide-1 to reduce inflammation, control sebum and support skin barrier recovery while delivering deep hydration.
how_to_apply: Apply 2-3 drops to clean skin after cleansing. Pat gently into skin until absorbed. Follow with moisturiser.
active_ingredients: Niacinamide, Low Molecular Weight Hyaluronic Acid (22mg/ml), Ol-Oligopeptide-1
contraindications: Patch test recommended. Avoid on broken skin.

how_to_apply: Apply two pumps to face and neck in the evening after cleansing. Allow to absorb, then follow with moisturiser. Phase in gradually — use twice a week for two weeks, then every other night, then nightly.
active_ingredients: Retinaldehyde 0.01%, Hyaluronic Acid, Glycerin, Vitamin E, Carrot Seed Oil
contraindications: Avoid during pregnancy and breastfeeding. Always use SPF the following morning. Do not use with other retinoids.

claude_description: An energising anti-pigmentation essence that refreshes, protects and hydrates the skin. Contains Arbutin to limit melanin production and reduce visible pigmentation alongside powerful antioxidants from Yuzu and Mulberry Extract.
how_to_apply: Apply to clean skin after cleansing. Pat gently over face and neck until absorbed. Follow with moisturiser.
active_ingredients: Arbutin, Yuzu Fruit Extract, Mulberry Bark Extract, Low Molecular Weight Hyaluronic Acid
contraindications: Patch test recommended for sensitive skin

how_to_apply: Apply to damp skin morning and evening. Massage gently and rinse thoroughly. Follow with SPF in the morning.
active_ingredients: Salicylic Acid, Ceramides, Hyaluronic Acid, Niacinamide
contraindications: Avoid contact with eyes. Use SPF as salicylic acid increases photosensitivity.
